My 1st Pro Tournament of the Year.

Grant Horvat sinks a clutch birdie to take the lead.

clips.blurb: Grant Horvat Golf — pro-level matches and challenges against tour players and creators from one of YouTube golf's biggest names.
clips.note: Director 83/100 — First birdie, big genuine reaction, and 'We made him' creates a satisfying win
